speaker: Command
message: Engine 1 here Command. Report conditions at the structure entrance. Listening

speaker: Engine 1
message: Command here Engine 1. Heavy smoke pushing from upper windows. Visible flames near the roof line. Access near the entrance partially blocked by debris. Finished

speaker: Command
message: Rescue 2 here Command. Confirm civilian evacuation status near the sidewalk area. Listening

speaker: Rescue 2
message: Command here Rescue 2. Seven civilians accounted for near the safe perimeter. One civilian reporting smoke inhalation symptoms. Listening

speaker: Engine 1
message: Command here Engine 1. Fire extension increasing beneath the roof structure. Interior visibility near zero. Listening

speaker: Command
message: Engine 1 here Command. Confirm if suppression stream is reaching the upper fire area. Listening

speaker: Engine 1
message: Command here Engine 1. Negative. Water stream losing effectiveness due to heat conditions and elevation angle. Listening

speaker: Command
message: Engine 1 here Command. Reposition attack line closer to the parked vehicles side and continue exposure protection. Listening

speaker: Engine 1
message: Command here Engine 1. Affirmative. Repositioning hose team now. Three civilian vehicles currently exposed to heat. Listening

speaker: Command
message: Engine 1 here Command. Confirm if there are occupants inside the vehicles. Listening

speaker: Engine 1
message: Command here Engine 1. Affirmative. Possible occupants observed inside the vehicle closest to the fire area. Finished
